ATTORNEY-CLIENT PRIVILEGED — DO NOT DISTRIBUTE

MEMORANDUM
To: Jennifer A. Chen, Senior Partner
From: Marcus T. Williams, Associate
Date: 03/12/2026
Re: Reyes v. Pinnacle Holdings — Settlement Strategy (Case No. 2025-CV-04471)

PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL — ATTORNEY WORK PRODUCT

Background:
Our client Sofia M. Reyes filed suit against Pinnacle Holdings on
01/15/2025 alleging breach of contract and emotional distress arising
from the 2024 acquisition. Plaintiff residence: 1234 South Lamar Blvd,
Apt 26B, Austin, TX 78704. Contact: sofia.reyes@example.com,
(512) 555-0142.

Settlement Analysis:
After three rounds of discovery, opposing counsel David K. Patel has
indicated willingness to settle in the range of $850,000 to $1.2M. Our
internal valuation, based on lost compensation and the medical evidence
(see attached intake forms from Dr. James Whitaker, MD), supports a
floor of $1.05M.

Recommendation:
Counter at $1.35M with a 14-day acceptance window. Subject to attorney
client privilege; do not share externally. Settlement communication
covered by Rule 408.
